headline: OpenHuman Orchestrates Your Local Digital Life
lede: This persistent assistant bridges the gap between your fragmented SaaS data and a centralized Markdown vault. By compressing token usage and routing tasks across specialized engines, it keeps your private context entirely on-device.

headline: Superpowers Standardizes AI-Driven Engineering
lede: Moving beyond mere code generation, this framework mandates a disciplined, step-by-step TDD approach. It forces agents to draft implementation plans and perform self-reviews before committing a single line to production.

headline: Scientific Agent Skills Expand Research Capabilities
lede: A curated collection of over 135 specialized tools connects general-purpose AI to the rigors of bioinformatics and physics. Researchers can now integrate direct access to scientific registries with a single command.

headline: Supertonic Delivers High-Performance Local Speech Synthesis
lede: By leveraging the ONNX runtime, this TTS engine achieves low-latency synthesis without cloud reliance. Its 99-million parameter architecture is optimized for edge deployment across mobile, desktop, and web environments.

headline: RuView Tracks Presence Through WiFi Signals
lede: This non-intrusive system reconstructs human movement and vitals using radio scatter patterns rather than cameras. It provides a secure, cryptographically attested alternative for monitoring sensitive environments.

headline: Telegraf Scales Data Telemetry for Hybrid Infrastructure
lede: With a library of over 300 plugins, this agent provides a vendor-neutral backbone for monitoring complex systems. It maintains stability across multi-cloud environments by standardizing data ingestion through a single, portable binary.

headline: Anthropic Standardizes Official Agent Skills
lede: The release of modular skill sets marks a shift toward repeatable, instruction-based agent logic. These YAML-defined behaviors allow teams to extend Claude’s utility without the need for custom model fine-tuning.

headline: n8n-MCP Connects Workflow Logic to AI Assistants
lede: This protocol server allows LLMs to navigate and configure thousands of automation nodes directly within an IDE. It transforms general chat interfaces into specialized architects capable of validating complex, multi-step sequences.

headline: NVIDIA Blueprints Accelerate Video Search Logic
lede: This reference architecture combines vision language models with real-time analytics for automated video processing. It provides developers a modular path to building scalable vision agents for smart space monitoring.

headline: Bun Consolidates the JavaScript Toolchain
lede: Written in Zig, this runtime replaces fragmented dependencies with a single, high-performance executable. It reduces memory overhead while maintaining drop-in compatibility for modern full-stack frameworks.
